rows.summary: A new 'Financing Consultant' subsection is introduced, mandating franchisees to retain a franchisor-designated financing consultant during site selection for pro forma preparation and lender applications; compensation structure (1–2.5% loan fee) and potential affiliation of the consultant with a franchisor affiliate are disclosed. No corresponding provision existed in the 2024 FDD.

newEvidence.quote:
Financing Consultant
       During the site selection process, you must retain the services of a financing consultant designated by us to assist you with: (1) preparing a three (3) year financial pro forma outlining the actions that you will take to ensure that your operation and management of the School are in compliance with our standards;

and (2) preparing and submitting financial applications to our preferred lenders to obtain financing for the development of your School. The financing consultant may receive compensation from the lender that you select for financing the School that could range from 1% to 2.5% of the loan amount.
One of our affiliates may serve as a designated financing consultant.

rows.itemTitle: RESTRICTIONS ON SOURCES OF PRODUCTS AND SERVICES
rows.summary: The Item shifts from L&L Franchise System to MIXPLATE branding and introduces sweeping new operational mandates: franchisees must obtain *all food products* exclusively from franchisor-approved sources (replacing prior non-mandatory language); must comply with a confidential, amendable Operations Manual at their full cost without cap; and face expanded supplier approval criteria including mandatory lab testing, licensing fees, and confidentiality obligations. The franchisor also gains explicit authority to require participation in gift card, EBT, and credit/debit programs — all absent in 2017.

oldEvidence.quote: You are not required to purchase or lease any goods, supplies, equipment or fixtures from L & L Franchise, Inc. or its affiliates.
You must purchase food products, goods, and certain supplies [...] only from our approved suppliers (See Exhibit “G”).
You may purchase these items from approved suppliers or from any other supplier that can provide items previously approved as meeting our specifications.

newEvidence.quote: You are required to obtain all food products from us or our affiliates or sources we approve and according to our specifications.

You will strictly follow the requirements of the Operations Manual, including amendments we make to it periodically. You will carry out immediately all changes at your cost, unless we otherwise specify, and we do not limit or cap these expenses in any way.

We may require you to participate in a restaurant value card, gift card or gift certificate program, apply with the applicable government entity to accept electronic benefit transfer cards or food stamps and to accept credit and debit cards.
